text:
Once upon a time in the little town of Willow Creek, there was a naughty squirrel named Rufus. He didn't do much mischief. Well, except for this one time. One day, he decided he wanted some shiny new feathers.

So, he climbed up on Owl's nest, hoping to steal some. But Owl was there! Boooo!

They fought. Owl swung round wings. Rufus fell. bounced. That's when he found an old hat.

You probably think it has feathers.

It did. Except it was red. Rufus wore it. Kids laughed.

He didn't mind. He flew. They chased. He hid. He found berries.

One day, Dad saw him.

Why do you wear feathers?

Because now I scare birds!

He laughed. Maybe you should go quietly.

But maybe.

Later, they'd find him. Just a little bald spot.

Oh, dad.

Maybe wear a hat.

Rufus did. Now he thinks. But anyway.
